title: Specialist, Customer Care (Planner)
description:
Key Job Purpose:

  • Regional Spare parts inventory management and planning
  • Management of spare part setting in ERP system for each Affiliates
  • Analysis of Spare parts replenishment for each affiliate and propose the solution based on varies source
  • Improvement of management of spare part with SCORP team in order to achieve go turnover ratio

Job Responsibilities:


1. Spare parts management and planning:

  • Work with SCM team to manage stock inventory
  • Maintain MRP for fast- and slow-moving items
  • Write-off products/materials for non-moving parts and/or discontinued/obsolete
  • Close monitoring - work with affiliates on MRP usage. Investigate and rectify
  • issues if the affiliates are not using the MRP tool fully
  • Perform mass activation of new products/materials that will be provided by all
  • manufacturers
  • Generating report for spare parts movement on a monthly basis


2. Engineering Change Record (ECR)/ Technical Bulletin (TB) releases:

  • Update the Spare part setting in ERP system base on information release from ECR or TB released
  • Negotiate with SCORP spare part team to ensure the parts available during the
  • transition period.


3. Analysis of Spare parts replenishment for each affiliate and propose the

solution based on varies source.

  • From the analysis, propose the MRP setting for each Affiliates.
  • Propose the MRP setting for each Affiliates, this will ensure that they will have stock just in time for the operation.


4. Any other additional related responsibilities and project as required by

Superior



Job Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma / Degree or equivalent in Computer Science / Business Management / Information Technology / Biomedical / Mechatronic / Electronic in Engineering
  • 2-3 years relevant experience in Customer Relationship Management (CRM) and ERP (SAP system) system is an added advantage
  • Proficiency in using Microsoft Excel.
  • Excellent oral and written communication skills in English

postedCompany.description:
Sysmex delivers total solutions in the field of clinical laboratory testing, including hematology and urinalysis. In the core field of hematology, Sysmex is the global market leader, occupying the number-one share of the worldwide market. Sysmex is also the number-one supplier of coagulation instrumentation worldwide

Sysmex Asia Pacific is a market leader in the field of clinical laboratory testing and health information technology products and services supplying to laboratories, hospitals and healthcare organizations.  

Proven benefits to laboratories, hospitals and healthcare providers include improved patient clinical services and efficiency advances leading to cost savings, ultimately translating to the delivery of better patient care.

Located at the centre of regional market operations, Singapore is the Sysmex headquarters of the Asia Pacific region.
postedCompany.name: SYSMEX ASIA PACIFIC PTE. LTD.
